articles.title: SEC acknowledges 21Shares’ proposal to permit staking on Ethereum ETF
articles.description: If staking were approved, the ETFs will be able to generate additional returns on their ETH holdings, which could potentially be passed on to investors.

articles.description: Historical data supports an explosive ETH price rally in 2025, but the first step in this journey could be swift return to cycle lows.

articles.title: SEC seeks public comments for WisdomTree’s proposal for an XRP ETF
articles.description: The U.S. SEC is looking for public comments to decide how to move forward with a proposal for an XRP exchange-traded fund.

articles.title: Tether Sends $800,000,000 in USDT to Binance As Institutions Begin Onramping: Arkham
articles.description: Tether, the largest stablecoin issuer in the world, has been spotted sending $800 million worth of its USDT to Binance, the biggest crypto exchange by volume. According to data from blockchain “de-anonymizing” firm Arkham, Tether sent two batches of 400 million USDT to Binance early on Wednesday. articles.title: World’s first XRP spot ETF to debut on Brazil’s leading stock exchange
articles.description: Brazil's Securities and Exchange Commission (CVM) has approved the world's first exchange-traded fund that directly holds XRP, Ripple's native coin, from Hashdex, as shown in the database of the CVM and first reported by Portal do Bitcoin.The newly approved ETF, called "the Hashdex NASDAQ XRP Index Fund," is expected to launch on Brazils main stock exchange B3. articles.title: SEC Acknowledges Bitwise XRP ETF Filing—Approval Within Reach?
articles.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has formally acknowledged a filing for a spot XRP Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) from Bitwise. This marks the start of the regulatory review process, which could take up to 90 days. articles.title: Binance.US restores fiat deposits and withdrawals for the first time since 2023
articles.description: Fiat functionality was paused in June 2023 after the SEC sued Binance.US, alleging violations of securities laws.

articles.title: Cardano’s Charles Hoskinson Teams Up With Lawmakers On Crypto Rules
articles.description: Cardano founder, Charles Hoskinson, is working closely with lawmakers and regulators to establish clear rules for crypto securities and commodities. He advises government entities on defining decentralization and ensuring proper regulations for the crypto industry. articles.title: Solana’s Market Woes Continue With A 32% Monthly Drop—Details
articles.description: Solana’s recent price behavior has sparked anxiety in the the digital currency market. The once-soaring blockchain has fallen significantly as a result of a widespread slump. Solana native token (SOL) has been down 32% in the last four weeks, trailing Bitcoin’s 10% decline and Ethereum’s 15% dip. articles.title: Strategy Plans $2B Stock Sale to Buy More Bitcoin
articles.description: Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) is issuing $2 billion in convertible notes to buy more Bitcoin, continuing its aggressive accumulation strategy.

articles.title: Uniswap CEO: Controversial Token Launches Are Intentional, Not Mistakes
articles.description: Uniswap CEO Hayden Adams claims flawed token launches are intentional, not mistakes, sparking debate amid scandals over LIBRA, MELANIA, and TRUMP coins.

articles.title: Coinbase Launches Proof of Reserves for cbBTC Bitcoin Wrapper
articles.description: In response to mounting concerns over transparency, Coinbase has unveiled a Proof of Reserves (PoR) for its wrapped Bitcoin token, cbBTC. This move aims to assure users that each cbBTC is backed 1:1 by Bitcoin (BTC) held by the exchange.
